header.title: Base64 to File
header.subtitle: Convert your Base64 strings to files instantly and securely. 100% private, serverless processing, open source.

input.placeholder: Paste your Base64 string or Data URI here...
input.error_invalid: Error decoding Base64. Make sure the format is correct.

result.title: Recovered File
result.no_preview: Preview not available for this format. Please download the file.

encoder.error_too_large: The file exceeds the {mb}MB security limit.

footer.text: Designed with simplicity and a focus on privacy. All code runs on your device.
